feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Issue While Editing Custom Structure – Error in SAP Dictionary (SE11)
entry.content:
When trying to change or edit the custom structure ZMDI01_01 in SE11, the system throws an error message and prevents further editing.

The structure opens in Display mode, but upon attempting to edit or change attributes/components, the following error message is displayed:

“You cannot edit object R3TR TABL ZMDI01_01 with the standard editor.Choose ‘Display object’ or ‘Cancel’.”

Due to this error, changes to the structure cannot be performed.

STRCUTURE NAMES ARE

ZMDI01_01

 ZVEXO07_01

ZVDB00_NALI

entry.title: Is class_constructor a good method to place the buffer in?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

 

As the subject suggests. I'm trying to understand what the best method is for placing the buffer.

I know that Class_constructor can't be used with a WHERE clause; therefore, the buffer must read the whole table. I'm not sure if this is suitable for some cases or not, based on the size of the table. I would love a clear explanation of this topic.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment

entry.title: Generate ABAP Repository Objects not shown
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

Generate ABAP Repository Objects not shown in my system. Our eclipse version is Version: 2022-06 (4.24.0). Why Generate ABAP Repository Objects not shown?

 

Advance Thanks

entry.title: Invited user does not have access to SAP Appliance
entry.content:
Hi there!

I have created an SAP ABAP Platform 2023 developer edition on SAP HANA Appliance and it works correctly.

Then I invited another user. He clicked the invitation link, logged in and could see the appliance.

After logging out and in again he is not able to see the appliance anymore... 😑

It is only possible to see the appliance when he again uses the invitation link. There is an error message that the invitation does not exist or is expired. After that he can see the appliance again. 

What kind of glitch is this?!

Thanks for any hints!

Enno

/edit: I have used my personal SAP-User (P12345) and I can see the appliance correctly. It seems to be only the other P-user for which this does not work.

entry.title: Objects link creation/attach in projects app
entry.content:
Hi experts,
In the Projects app, we have implemented a custom tab in that based “Save” action. Currently, when the save action is triggered, a DIR (Document Info Record) document is successfully created and its was showing in the CV03N with attached file.

However, our requirement is to automatically link (or create and assign) this DIR document directly within the “Object Links” tab of the respective project.

Could you please guide us on how to achieve this functionality? Specifically:

  • How can the DIR be programmatically linked to the project object upon creation?
  • Are there any standard APIs, BAPIs, or enhancement options available for this scenario?

Any guidance or references would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Auto-Link DIR(Document info record) in Projects App Object Links tab.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

In the Projects app, I have added a custom tab to the DIR (Document Info Record) creation logic with a Save action. Currently, the document is being created successfully and is also getting updated in CV02N/CV03N with the file.

Now, we have an requirement: when the Save action is triggered from the custom tab, the same document should also be updated in the Object Links tab within the Projects app.

Is there a way to attach or link the document to the project using a Function Module (FM) or BAPI?

I would appreciate suggestions or best practices on how to achieve this.

Thanks in advance for your support!

entry.title: Efficient ABAP Query Design for Cleared Vendor and Customer Items (BKPF–BSAK / BKPF–BSAD)
entry.content:
Requirement Statement
We need to design efficient SELECT queries involving the following SAP tables:
  • BKPF (Accounting Document Header)
  • BSAK (Vendor Cleared Items)
  • BSAD (Customer Cleared Items)
Selection Screen Inputs
  • Mandatory fields:
    • Company Code (BUKRS)
    • Account Type (KOART)
    • Clearing Date (AUGDT)
    • Document Type (BLART)
    • Posting Key (BSCHL)
  • Optional fields:
    • Customer/Vendor Number (KUNNR / LIFNR)
    • Document Number (BELNR)
Challenge
  • In BKPF, the primary key requires BUKRS, BELNR, and GJAHR.
  • However, in the program:
    • Fiscal Year (GJAHR) is not available as input.
    • Document Number (BELNR) is optional.
We must therefore design queries that efficiently retrieve cleared items from BKPF + BSAK and BKPF + BSAD, while handling the absence of fiscal year input and optional document number.

entry.title: Call transaction CS02 ignores AEN (AENNR) field
entry.content:
Hi SAP gurus,

I'm having a weird problem that I cannot solve.

I have an ABAP program that displays an ALV grid with various info regarding a material. When the user clicks on the BOM cells of the ALV grid, one of my methods calls: CALL TRANSACTION 'CS02' AND SKIP FIRST SCREEN.

My code states:

SET PARAMETER ID 'AEN' FIELD lv_datum_fmt.

Where lv_datum_fmt is:

DATA: lv_datum_fmt TYPE char8.
lv_datum_fmt = sy-datum+6(2)
            && sy-datum+4(2)
            && sy-datum+0(4).
SHIFT lv_datum_fmt LEFT DELETING LEADING '0'.

The weird part is this: I use basically an identical method to call transaction CA02, and AEN is properly set up and the transaction opens correctly. But in CS02, the AEN is always initial and the transaction opens with a warning that the AENNR is not set up.

Can you please help me understand what I'm doing wrong? Is it perhaps a bug that has been fixed with a note?

Regards

entry.title: fagll03 is very slow on fagl_get_items_faglbsas
entry.content:
With a specific selection on FAGLL03 there are 17 entries in table FAGLBSAS.

The system gets this information through function FAGL_GET_ITEMS_FAGLBSAS.

Other accounts in this table have only 4 or 6 entries and are very quickly.

The difference is that the faster run finds all data through the command OPEN CURSOR while the 17 entries are not immediately covered by that and need an extra step: FETCH NEXT CURSOR.

This FETCH NEXT CURSOR is the step that takes a very long time. I can see that it does an inner-join between FAGLBSAS and FAGLFLEXA but if I do that myself, it's very fast (despite more than 40 million entries in FAGLFLEXA).

Is there any way how this can be solved ?

Our system: ECC6.0 BASIS 750 0029 SAP_FIN 618 0022

Kind regards,

Rene

entry.title: Remove Objects in ATC scans
entry.content:
We want to exclude objects during normal ATC scans. Although a BAdI supports this, it works only during release. As a result, we face challenges when changing the CD status in CHARM, as this re‑initiates the ATC scan and reports messages for the skipped objects.

Example : BRF+ generated function module (Z*) but does not follow naming convention for program variables and signature.  So exemption needs tobe requested for them everytime.

entry.title: Consuming API in RAP for Business Partner
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am using the Onpremise system where i have built RAP on top of this API for business partner.

In gateway test client service works fine and no issue in it.

I have built the class with required interface of RAP and when i run the class system goes 404 error.

Kindly suggest some idea on this. Thanks.

Issue is as below:

1. In the last statment of this code, when i debug the standard on the list of Entity set...I am not finding ENTITY as BUSINESS_PARTNER .

Am i missing anything on the below code ?

Service is already in active status.

I am not getting the response and it end up with error 404 .

cl_http_client=>create_by_destination( EXPORTING destination = 'NONE'

IMPORTING client = DATA(lo_http_client)

EXCEPTIONS argument_not_found = 1

destination_not_found = 2

destination_no_authority = 3

plugin_not_active = 4

OTHERS = 5 ).

 

 

lo_client_proxy = /iwbep/cl_cp_client_proxy_fact=>create_v2_remote_proxy(

EXPORTING

is_proxy_model_key = VALUE #( repository_id = 'DEFAULT'

proxy_model_id = 'ZABC'

proxy_model_version = '0001' )

io_http_client = lo_http_client

iv_relative_service_root = '/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER/' ).

 

" Navigate to the resource

lo_request = lo_client_proxy->create_resource_for_entity_set( 'BUSINESS_PARTNER' )->create_request_for_read( ).

Regards,

Karthik S

entry.title: ABAP Cloud Trial: Service Definition and Binding Not Working newly Created Package
entry.content:
Hi SAP RAP Champion,

my package under ZLOCAL 



I attempted to create a Service Definition and Service Binding in the package ZFE_ATS_PR. However, when I preview the service binding, it displays a blank screen.

 

I created a similar Service Definition and Service Binding using the same CDS root entity (without creating a new CDS root) in another package, ZFE_TRAVEL_000405, which was generated by the class ZDMO_CL_FE_TRAVEL_GENERATOR(https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/fiori-tools-rap-prepare-service..html), and it works as expected.

Additionally, when I run the newly created artifacts (Service Definition → Service Binding) in the package created by the autogenerated class, they work correctly. I also tried previewing the service binding from another user’s package, and it works fine there as well.

To troubleshoot further, I deleted my ABAP Cloud Trial cockpit account and recreated it, but the issue still persists. am missing any configuration, authorization, or package-related setting?

Your valuable suggestions would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks,
Pradhan

entry.title: Can We Build Live Insights Using CDS Views and SAP Analytics Cloud Within 15 Days?
entry.content:
Hello Community,

My name is E Pranith Kumar, and I am a fresher. My team and I are eager to take up a meaningful challenge and deliver a strong outcome within a short timeline.

We are exploring the possibility of building live insights using CDS Views and SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC). I would like to understand:

  • Is it feasible to build live analytical insights using CDS Views and SAC within 15 days?
  • If yes, what are the key prerequisites (system setup, authorizations, versions, and connectivity)?
  • Which T-codes/tools are typically used for:
    • Creating and exposing CDS Views
    • Enabling live connectivity to SAC
    • Authorization and data access

We have been provided with a few use cases (attached below). Since we are new to this domain, your guidance would be extremely helpful:

  • Which use case would be best suited for a short timeline?
  • Which one offers the best feature scope and business impact?
  • What SAP modules are typically involved for the recommended use case?
  • What type of system access or roles would be required to implement it?

Additionally, if possible, could you please recommend any learning resources or documentation that would help us research, learn, and implement this effectively?

Although we are new to CDS Views and SAC, we are highly motivated and ready to put in the effort. With your guidance, we are confident we can deliver meaningful insights.

Thank you very much for your time and support. I truly appreciate any direction you can provide.

Best regards,
E Pranith Kumar

entry.title: There's a tutorial where I don't know how to proceed.
entry.content:
Is the following tutorial possible in a TDD S/4HANA Cloud environment?

[Tutorial] Integrate SAP BTP, ABAP environment and SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition using Basic Authentication

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-environment-business-partner-basic-auth.html

The Customizing tenant allows the selection of the communication contract "SAP_COM_0008," but cannot be connected from Eclipse because "BR_DEVELOPER" cannot be assigned.

The Development tenant can be connected from Eclipse because "BR_DEVELOPER" can be assigned, but the communication contract "SAP_COM_0008" cannot be selected.

entry.title: How to Call Dynamic Function in Sap ABAP
entry.content:
Data: LT_Ptab type ABAP_Func_parmbind_Tab,

lt_etab type ABAP_Func_excpbind_Tab,

lv_func_name type rs38l_fnam.

 

call function lv_func_name

parameter-table lt_ptab

exception-table lt_etab.

entry.title: ALV Report in SAP ABAP not refresh( but Instance CL_GUI_ALV_GRID not bound) (ALV SHOWING State)
entry.content:
Hi community, i have a case about calling dynmic function to show multitab in subscreen with alv.

Problem is: First time it showing be ok, and second time with hotspot click, it still hold at screen at first time ( In ALV tab). I have used to use refresh, but grid not bound, and in present, i using cl_gui_flw=>flush( ). But still not working, problem in subscreen is what.

Another any one having question.

entry.title: Learning hub / UX400 / Unable to run code due to errors
entry.content:
Community,

This may not be the right place for this. Please advise.

I have a learning hub subscription and am studying for my certification in Fiori Development. I am in course UX400 specifically that deals with freestyle Fiori development. I am unable to run anything due to errors. Support is taking 8-11 days to respond and most of those responses do not resolve anything.

I am looking for someone that is developing Fiori to ask technical questions to, BAS specifically.

Thank you!

Crew Reynolds

entry.title: BDC scroll issue AB01
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am facing this issue, we added 93 and 95 to this table, but when I created BDC table it doesn't scroll down to get the last 2
I tried =P+ OK_CODE and didn't work 
Can anyone please help?

entry.title: New SAP Member Introduction – Ajay Gawali – Eager to Connect on SAP ABAP & S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I’m Ajay Gawali, a final-year Electronics and Computer Engineering student and aspiring SAP ABAP Developer based in Nashik, India.

I’m currently focusing on SAP ABAP, S/4HANA, and modern technologies like CDS Views, RAP, and OData. Alongside this, I also explore AI/ML and full-stack development to build practical, real-world solutions.

I joined the SAP Community to connect with professionals, learn from real project experiences, and stay updated with the latest SAP innovations. I’m particularly interested in discussions around:

  • SAP ABAP on HANA
  • Fiori/UI5 development
  • Real-time SAP project implementations

Recently, I worked on projects like:

  • Activated Camera System using Python & OpenCV
  • Exploring SAP ABAP concepts including Data Dictionary, Open SQL, and modularization

These experiences helped me understand how backend logic and real-time systems work together.

I would love to connect with professionals, mentors, and fellow learners working on similar technologies and challenges.

Looking forward to learning and contributing to the community!

Best regards,
Ajay Gawali

entry.title: Header: Inconsistent with the runtime object
entry.content:
Hi All
I created a custom table and later changed a data element. After this change, errors started appearing, and I was not able to add or delete fields in the table.
then I deleted the table and tried to recreate it, but the table could not be activated properly and errors continued.
Error is: No active name tab exists for ZTEST_T1 Termination due to inconsistencies Table ZTEST_T1(Statements could not be generated) Error number in DD_DECIDE (9).
To fix this, I created a new table first and then copied it using the old table name. After running the required function module(DD_TABL_ACTM), the table was activated successfully and the SE14 database adjustment was completed.
Now, the table works at runtime. I am able to activate the table and enter data without any issues. However, in SE14 → Database Object Check, one field is still shown as inconsistent (in red). This field was already deleted earlier. Also, for this specific table name only, I am not able to add or delete fields. Copying the table works, but modifying the structure does not.
If I create the same table with a different name, everything works fine. Please advise how to permanently resolve the database object inconsistency and confirm whether it is safe to transport this object to the QA system.
Runtime object check: Consistent Please find the attached screenshot. SE14 database object check: Shows field inconsistency Please find the attached screenshot.

 


Note: SAP system is ECC and database system is DB6. (SAP_BASIS :740)

Thanks,
venkat.
